componentDescription: A temporary side panel that slides in from the edge of the screen to display content.

placement.description: Defines the position where the drawer will appear (e.g., 'left', 'right', 'top', 'bottom').

size.description: Specifies the size of the drawer.

isOpen.description: Indicates whether the drawer is currently open or closed.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when the drawer is requested to close.

isClosePrevented.description: Prevents the drawer from closing when an overlay click or escape key is pressed.

children.description: The content to be rendered inside the drawer.
